creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: crees
Date: Fri Aug 10 15:47:34 2012
New Revision: 302391
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/302391

Log:
  Update to 5.12
  
  Update maintainer's email address
  
  PR:		ports/167983
  Submitted by:	maintainer (Thomas Zander <thomas.e.zander@googlemail.com>)

Modified:
  head/cad/linux-eagle5/Makefile
  head/cad/linux-eagle5/distinfo
  head/cad/linux-eagle5/pkg-plist

Modified: head/cad/linux-eagle5/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/cad/linux-eagle5/Makefile	Fri Aug 10 14:38:47 2012	(r302390)
+++ head/cad/linux-eagle5/Makefile	Fri Aug 10 15:47:34 2012	(r302391)
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	linux-eagle5
-EAGLEBASEVERSION?=	5.11
+EAGLEBASEVERSION?=	5.12
 EAGLEBUGFIX?=	0
 EAGLEVERSION=	${EAGLEBASEVERSION}.${EAGLEBUGFIX}
 PORTVERSION=	${EAGLEVERSION:S/r/./}
@@ -16,7 +16,7 @@ MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.cadsoft.de/eagle
 DISTNAME=	eagle-${EAGLEVERSION}
 DISTFILES=	eagle-lin-${EAGLEVERSION}.run
 
-MAINTAINER?=	riggs@rrr.de
+MAINTAINER?=	thomas.e.zander@googlemail.com
 COMMENT?=	An easy to use, yet powerful tool for designing printed circuit boards
 
 ONLY_FOR_ARCHS=	i386 amd64
